THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PENDER, WADE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 493 HAIGHT ST, #30, S.F, CA. $4,888.00 RENT, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,023.00, INT. AT 5% PER ANNUM. MONTHLY PMTS. TO BE MADE IN TIMELY FASHION. IF DEF. DEFAULTS ON JUDGMENT ATTY. FEES OF $1,500 WILL BE OWED. ENFORCEMENT OF JUDGMENT STAYED FOR AS LONG AS DEF NO IN DEFAULT ON JUDGMENT. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETTE JUDG- MENT DETAILS.
